_setup: 1. Go to console.cloud.google.com → Select or create a project 2. Enable the Google Analytics Data API 3. Go to Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID → Application type: Web application 4. Add http://localhost:3000/oauth2callback as an authorized redirect URI 5. Copy Client ID and Client Secret 6. Run the auth flow once to get your refresh token 7. Get your GA4 Property ID from analytics.google.com → Admin → Property Settings (just the numbers, no 'G-' prefix)
_examples: Pull landing page conversion rate for the last 30 days
Show me traffic by source for this week
What is the bounce rate on the main opt-in page?
Compare this month's sessions to last month
